bundles.title: RunState Core/Adapter Field Split
bundles.goal: Extract RunStateCoreFields and redefine RunState as a generic intersection type with backward-compatible default.

tasks.title: Define RunStateCoreFields interface in src/types/contracts.ts extracting all fields from current RunState
Redefine RunState as generic type alias: RunState<TAdapter extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, never>> = RunStateCoreFields & TAdapter
Export RunStateCoreFields from src/types/contracts.ts and verify existing re-exports still work
Run npm run typecheck to confirm all existing consumers compile without changes

bundles.title: PhaseContract Structured Extension
bundles.goal: Add declarative input, output, and gate_conditions optional fields to PhaseContract.

tasks.title: Define PhaseIODescriptor interface with readonly artifacts field in src/lib/phase-router/types.ts
Define GateCondition interface with kind union type and optional target field in src/lib/phase-router/types.ts
Add optional input, output, and gate_conditions fields to existing PhaseContract interface
Export PhaseIODescriptor and GateCondition from src/lib/phase-router/types.ts
Run npm run typecheck and existing phase-router tests to confirm backward compatibility

bundles.title: resolveRunId Auto-Resolution
bundles.goal: Implement resolveRunId function returning Result type for Change ID to Run ID resolution.

tasks.title: Define ResolveRunIdErrorKind type and ResolveRunIdError interface in src/lib/run-store-ops.ts
Implement resolveRunId(store, changeId) using findLatestRun and status filtering, returning Result<string, ResolveRunIdError>
Handle all error cases: no_active_run, change_not_found, multiple_active_runs
Export resolveRunId, ResolveRunIdError, and ResolveRunIdErrorKind

bundles.title: RunState Generic Type Tests
bundles.goal: Add compile-time assignability tests verifying RunState generic behavior and backward compatibility.

tasks.title: Write compile-time test: unparameterized RunState is assignable from existing RunState shape
Write compile-time test: RunState<CustomAdapter> includes both core and adapter fields
Write compile-time test: adapter fields that shadow core fields produce type errors
Write compile-time test: RunStateCoreFields is independently importable and usable

bundles.title: resolveRunId Unit Tests
bundles.goal: Test all five resolveRunId scenarios using in-memory RunArtifactStore.

tasks.title: Write test: returns run_id for single active run
Write test: returns run_id for suspended run when no active exists
Write test: returns no_active_run error when all runs are terminal
Write test: returns change_not_found error when changeId has no runs

bundles.title: Existing Conformance Test Verification
